channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large Pot Hole, 7th March
item.description:
Large pot hole just a few meters past the traffic lights heading towards fish roundabout. Please arrange to inspect and repair
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste / furniture improperly discarded, 7th March
item.description:
Household items dumped outside home again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mortimer Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole, 7th March
item.description:
Junction going into cray valley road from the main road there is a big pot hole Been there months getting worse and worse. You cannot take the turn without going down it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bracondale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, bagged, 7th March
item.description:
Dead fox in front of 52 Granby Road. We’ve bagged it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granby Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can you please replace the bin that was burnt down, 7th March
item.description:
You got rid of the bin that was burnt down but you haven’t replaced it so there has been an increase of rubbish in the area. Please replace the bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping next to communal bin on both sides, 7th March
item.description:
Rubbish has been left outside the communal bin on both the left and right sides instead of being placed inside. Items include a large construction sack on a pallet and cardboard boxes with furniture inside as well as other misc items.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering on road, 7th March
item.description:
I am writing to report an ongoing issue with littering along Tennyson Road. This has become a continual problem and the amount of rubbish left along the street has noticeably increased. The area experiences a high level of footfall throughout the day, which unfortunately seems to be contributing to the accumulation of litter. Food packaging, drink containers, and general waste are regularly left on the pavement and around the street, creating an untidy and unpleasant environment for residents. This is not an isolated incident but a recurring issue that continues to worsen. I would be grateful if the council could arrange more regular street cleaning and consider additional measures to help address the problem, such as installing more bins or signage to discourage littering. Maintaining a clean street is important for the local community, and I hope the council can look into this matter and take appropriate action. Thank you for your attention to this issue and I look forward to hearing how it can be resolved.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tennyson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Blocked and trip hazard pavement, 7th March
item.description:
Car charger and cover making pavement hazardous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridgeway Drive, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: On grass next to nunber 21 athelstan gardens, 7th March
item.description:
Building material.left here by Cadent gas after completing gas work on behalf of Westminster Council for a property they own in athelstan gardens. This work was done on the 18 February 2026, we expected they woukd come and collect this stuff but they haven't.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned broken toys, 7th March
item.description:
Appeared overnight

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same car parked on pavement at Pynfolds estate, almost every night, 7th March
item.description:
This car is parked on pavement almost every night, in all impunity. It blocks access to the bike sheds, forces prams on the road and probably makes access for emergency and delivery vans difficult.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
A large wardrobe left on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Aylesbury Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: 2 pot holes on crossing, 7th March
item.description:
On the crossing there are 2 pot holes one each side of the road getting bigger and won't be too long before they become dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Church Hill Road, East Barnet, Greater London

item.title: 2 fridges and household waste flytipped, 7th March
item.description:
Reporting again flytipped waste on Clapton terrace. Report claimed to have been collected but hasn’t.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shrubs and bushes obstructing footpath, 7th March
item.description:
The over hanging shrubs are making limited space for walking past. It hasn’t been trimmed for over a year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tent Peg Lane, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
